items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Imperial blood ran in his veins. Straw sandals wove through his fingers.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: He did not sigh from fear. The fire was there — he just had nothing to burn it on.

items.speaker: zhang_fei
items.text: If you're a real man, fight for your country — why stand here sighing!

items.speaker: zhang_fei
items.text: I'll fund it — we recruit men and fight together.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: The wine hadn't arrived, but the shadow at the door moved first.
